at least one month ago,, at the dpnr visit , you had promised to research the two names given to you by themm one for the beach reclaiming, and the other fro the underwater ball reeefs.. to date I've received nothing about this ...please...

MEMORANDUM

Privileged and Confidential

 

To:      Jeffrey Epstein

From:  John Amerling           

Re:      Weekly Progress Report                  

Date:   October 27, 2006       

           

The following is brief summary of the material events of the past week:

 

·        A design team meeting was held on Wednesday October 25, 2006 in New York : the most significant developments of which were:

 

o       The CZM drawings for the Pool Expansion were reviewed; several changes were made and the documents were to be posted to the FTP website on Thursday.

o       A complete walk through of the house and library designs was conducted and many questions and issues were raised for further resolution.

o       A considerable amount of time was spent on defining the interfaces among the specialty contractors selected by Molyneux with the client’s approval and the balance of the team; there are many issues including shop drawings and coordination of deliveries and installation; RR is to work out a protocol..

o       The phasing plan was revised accordingly.

o       The schedule for production of CZM drawings for the combined complex on Friday for filing Monday; they will be overnighted Friday night.

o       A future design meeting  will be held in three weeks.

 

·        CZM filings for Phase I will be made Monday.

·        The Pond Bay estimate and contract has been released to Mr. Indyke.

·        Budgets for the Office will be released on Monday for client review and scheduling and budgeting for all Phase I activities have been initiated.

·        A barge has been located and negotiations are on going to procure it.

·        About two man weeks have been expended in the past week and we expect that the same out of effort will be expended over the next week.
